title: CodeGrind AI Assistant: Guided Problem-Solving in Real Time
summary: Showcase the newly enhanced AI assistant in CodeGrind with a guided problem-solving flow, highlighting multi-model support and real-time guidance within the editor.
core_message: CodeGrind now offers an upgraded AI assistant (Azure OpenAI) that helps users tackle LeetCode-like problems directly in the code editor, with model switching, persistent chat, and real-time guidance to accelerate learning.
cta: Try the new AI-assisted problem solving in CodeGrind today and share your first solved problem with a screenshot.
visual_brief: Short looping video: 1) user opens CodeGrind editor, 2) selects AI model and receives step-by-step hints, 3) user implements solution, 4) a quick results panel shows diagnostic feedback and score

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

bluesky_personal.text: CodeGrind AI Assistant is here. See real-time guidance in the editor, multi-model switching, and persistent chats for guided problem-solving. Watch a short loop of opening the editor, choosing a model, stepping through hints, and receiving instant feedback. Try the AI-assisted problem solving now.

linkedin.text: CodeGrind introduces an upgraded AI assistant (Azure OpenAI) for guided problem-solving directly in the code editor. The short looping visual demonstrates selecting a model, receiving step-by-step hints, implementing a solution, and viewing real-time diagnostic feedback. Try the new AI-assisted problem solving in CodeGrind today and share your first solved problem with a screenshot. https://codegrind.online

facebook_page.text: Introducing the CodeGrind AI Assistant: a guided problem-solving flow in the editor with real-time feedback.
